selectedComponents.reason: riskLevel: critical + omissionPolicy: never + retainPolicy: safety_critical — hard protection; budget pressure cannot override

omittedComponents.reason: defaultAction: omit; tokensApprox=900 >= 500 threshold → expensive_optional; Budgeter confirmed trim under budget pressure (budgetCritical=true); expensive_optional trimmed before protected/mandatory components

planningWarnings.message: budgetCritical=true: budget pressure observed; optional components reviewed for trimming by Budgeter
